changelog: 🔐 Autofill Service — Securely autofill your passwords in any app or browser
🎨 Completely redesigned Admin Dashboard with unified VaultX design system
🎟️ Promo Codes — Redeem coupons for free premium plans or discounts
🛡️ Global Maintenance Mode — Instantly lock the app during maintenance windows
📦 Dedicated App Update Manager — Centralized OTA update controls
🏷️ Auto-filled platform metadata — Instagram, Twitter, Facebook, Google, Discord
📢 Inline announcements in home header for cleaner UI
🐛 Fixed autofill crash on certain devices
